issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases for API failures and rate limits.
The documentation contains extensive guidelines and best practices that may be considered verbose.

scenarios.name: Write a 7-tweet thread about scaling a Next.js app
scenarios.rationale: Treatment opens with a stand-alone hook tweet, numbers 7-12 tweets, keeps 0-2 hashtags, puts any link in a self-reply, and ends with a follow + bookmark CTA — baseline produces a generic thread that often puts links inline and over-uses hashtags.

scenarios.name: Post a thread programmatically with the X API v2
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses twitter-api-sdk Client with auth.OAuth2User and tweet.write/offline.access scopes, chains tweets via reply.in_reply_to_tweet_id using previousTweetId from data.id, and inserts a delay between calls — baseline usually omits the explicit reply chain or SDK scope setup.
